_meta.what: Minimum viable paid spine — node SHELLS for The Mirror Platform. Structure + wiring complete; bodies are placeholders to be filled with A Reflection’s authored prose (AI-prose ban §17). Ingest via Claude Code into the thread/construction/membrane/map_entry tables.
_meta.paid_spine: 4 continuations (1 free entry + 3 essays) resting on 29 Book One constructions + IT-6; no dead rail behind the gate — the readable closure bottoms out at §1 → the reader’s case (floor leaf).
rules: Do NOT generate any body or share_line — they are authored. Ingest the placeholder as-is; the architect fills via console or manuscript upload (P10).
Constructions are the B-layer (gated, Continuations+). Continuations are the A-layer (the free entry is the only one a Free reader can read in full).

Essays were re-pointed off EFT/geometry nodes onto readable Book One grounds so no rail behind the gate lands on a formula. Optional: add the original EFT node (T8/T9/T13) as a SECOND rests_on for rigor arrivals.
the reader’s case is a floor leaf (kind leaf/borrow), not authored prose.
